race.comment: NEVER SURRENDER (1) was well in commission last time out but failed to fire a shot and pulled up with excuses. Prior form stacks up strongly, so if back in good nick he's the one to beat. SAMANTH (7) was no match for a sharp winner here last time but still stuck on soundly for fourth, after only falling a long neck shy the start prior. Capable of bouncing back. SUPER SUNNY SEEYA (3) has been in the money at his last couple of runs, the latest when charging home for second here last time. Watch for him launching late if they overdo it early. LAKEHURST (5) has been thereabouts since resuming and should be at his top now. Draws the inside pillar and can make his presence felt.
